description: A contractor on site has a question about a design drawing and needs clarification from the engineering team. A formal RFI must be logged.

nodes.task_description: Open the RFI module and start a new request.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully initiates a new RFI.

nodes.task_description: Enter the details of the question, referencing the specific drawing number and section in question.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly documents the contractor's question.

nodes.task_description: Submit the RFI, which is then automatically routed to the lead engineer for that discipline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits the RFI, and the system assigns it to the responsible engineer.
